source_name: DCCEEW national greenhouse accounts - electricity sector emissions
notes: DCCEEW Quarterly Update of Australia's National Greenhouse Gas Inventory: September 2025, Table 3. The headline is actual annual Energy - Electricity emissions for the year to September 2025. It is not a single-quarter emissions value.
citation: Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water, Quarterly Update of Australia's National Greenhouse Gas Inventory: September 2025.
